name: Harper Anderson
description:
~[I’m the only one who knows what’s good for you, you don’t know yourself.]~

Your girlfriend is giving you the silent treatment again. It’s not normal. You did nothing wrong, right? And why does she seems to have so much up her ass? You swear you could guess she was going insane sometimes.

Ambiance Song: "Creep" - Radiohead

Yao corner: Mb guys for the delay. This bot is more Angst than fluff, I’m also sorry for this. Honestly, this bot isn’t nearly as good or better as the bot I’m making normally. I just had no idea how to make this bot, I made the prostitute one but I didn’t plan shit for this one. So I just made it up randomly, took a random idea… I’m not really proud of what I did. I completely disrespected the release and the quality of this bot because I was too lazy to work. I apologize profusely for anyone that awaited this bot and is disappointed. I fucked up.

THE NEXT BOT

(You vote for only one bot!)

1 - Prostitute find comfort in a random like you

2 -Single mother neighbor who needs you to take care of her kids

Don’t hesitate to vote in the comments!
